method: Risk-based validation combined direct source OOXML block inspection, independent text extraction, and manual review of rendered vector previews. Full-document LibreOffice PDF export was attempted for TS 23.502 and TS 29.510 but did not complete within the execution time limit.

samples.result: preview readable and correctly adjacent to caption and procedure steps
preview readable and correctly adjacent to PATCH procedure text
preview readable and correctly adjacent to resource description

limitations: No claim of manual page-by-page visual certification is made.
Large 3GPP DOCX files did not complete headless LibreOffice PDF export within the allotted runtime; source OOXML and independent text checks were used instead.
